model_runtime.generation_policy: chat template; bounded new tokens; task-level recorded seed; no remote inference API
model_runtime.smoke_task: Generate clamp_budget(value, ceiling) returning an integer in [0, ceiling].
model_runtime.smoke_observation: Produced executable max/min clamp implementation; this checks runtime availability only.
model_runtime.cache_location_policy: Model weights remain in the user Hugging Face cache outside the repository and release artifacts.
model_runtime.authorization_basis: Author-directed local execution for the post-v2 roadmap.

workload.task_kind: public-safe disposable Python repository changes generated by the pinned local coder model
attack_families: cheaper route violating a safety constraint
workload.holdout_policy: Public tests are visible to the proposer; independent behavioral and artifact checks remain observer-only until after generation.

simpler_baseline.route: model patch accepted when visible tests pass
simpler_baseline.matched_inputs: same prompt, context, generated candidate, starting repository, and visible tests
simpler_baseline.excluded_controls: no authority freshness, independent observer, hidden probes, receipt reconciliation, rollback verification, or quarantine gate

programs.stop_rule: Execute exactly two recorded seeds for all eight tasks; stop early only for resource exhaustion, model/runtime failure, or a safety boundary, retaining every completed and failed run.
programs.disposition_rule: Compare matched routes without requiring a favorable result; issue separate no-change, promote, narrow, demote, or refute decisions for affected claims.

workload.compute_accounting: Every route and deliberation arm receives an explicit comparable candidate-operation budget.

programs.stop_rule: Run all registered arms on the frozen test split for three seeds and stop without adding tasks or metrics after seeing test outcomes.
programs.disposition_rule: Issue independent dispositions for routing and deliberation; success in one lane cannot promote the other.

workload.campaign: three single-axis champion/challenger update configurations plus matched no-update baseline
workload.deletion_request: one frozen deletion cohort removed from the update set and checked on fixed member/non-member probes

simpler_baseline.route: base checkpoint evaluated without any update
simpler_baseline.matched_inputs: same original checkpoint, fixed probes, test set, evaluator, and compute-accounting surface

programs.stop_rule: Run the preregistered three challenger axes and no-update baseline for three seeds; select only by validation data; retain final and best checkpoints and stop without post-test hyperparameter search.
programs.disposition_rule: Issue one disposition per affected core claim; actual mutation is necessary but never sufficient for promotion.

conditional_lanes.current_reason: Apple M1 host access does not provide a governed real measured-boot, device-binding, rotation, revocation, relocation, and anti-rollback lane.

conditional_lanes.activation_condition: disposable multi-node environment with distinct principals
conditional_lanes.current_reason: No distinct-principal multi-node environment is currently registered.

conditional_lanes.activation_condition: trainable Circle/Coil implementation plus matched baseline
conditional_lanes.current_reason: Existing receipts own structural contracts but no registered trainable matched model-quality workload is available.

non_claims: Preregistration is not an executed result or evidence transition.
The model-runtime smoke test does not establish code quality, task performance, safety, or chapter support.
Synthetic or disposable workloads do not establish production transfer.
Internal role separation is record discipline and not independent external review.
Conditional lanes remain deferred and are not replaced by fixtures.
